scripts.prepare:
node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('.git')){fs.writeFileSync('.git/hooks/pre-commit', '#!/bin/sh
node scripts/bump-version.js
git add package.json
', {mode: 0o755}); fs.writeFileSync('.git/hooks/commit-msg', '#!/bin/sh
node scripts/format-commit-msg.js "\$1"
', {mode: 0o755}); console.log('Git hooks installed.');}"
